% ------------------------------------------- %

\documentclass{standalone}

\usepackage[svgnames]{xcolor}
\usepackage[3d]{luadraw}

\directlua{
  dofile('../../../..//products/lua/palapi.lua')

  dofile('../../../../products/lua/palettes-hf/Electric.lua')
}

\begin{document}
\begin{luadraw}{name = Electric-palette}
local PAL = palElectric

local PALSIZE  = #PAL
local PALDIM   = .75
local PALDELTA = .3

local g = graph:new{
  window = {-100, 100, -5, 5},
  bbox   = false
}

g:Linewidth(2)

local A = Z(-20, 4)
local v = Z(0, -PALDIM)

for k = 1, PALSIZE do
  local color = rgb(PAL[k])

  g:Drectangle(
    A, A + PALDIM, A + PALDIM + v,
    "color = black, fill = " .. color
  )

  g:Dlabel(
    "$" .. k .. "$",
    A + Z(PALDIM, 1.2*PALDIM) / 2,
    {pos="S"}
  )

  A = A + PALDIM + PALDELTA

  if k % 10 == 0 then
    A = A + Z(-10*(PALDIM + PALDELTA), -2*PALDIM)
  end
end

g:Show()
\end{luadraw}
\end{document}
